subject: cleanup(css): remove unused brand color palette from @theme
body:
The 10-shade brand palette (brand-50 through brand-900) was carried
over from the pre-DaisyUI era. No component uses any brand-* Tailwind
class — CashflowGraph uses the raw hex #10b981 directly (ApexCharts
requires hardcoded values). Removed all 10 shades, kept only the 3
data visualization colors (overspend, underspend, data-neutral).

Tags: cleanup, css, theme
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 1
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: daisyui-migration
Semver: patch
